economic_notes: Halalt Logging Contracting LP for truck log hauling on reserve (set up April 5, 2017). 1241478 BC LTD incorporated February 20, 2020 to purchase and hold title of lands and buildings. 20% interest in Hul'q'umi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership. Treaty negotiations carried on by Hul'qumi'num Treaty Group.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to insufficient records for accounts payable/receivable and inability to obtain audited financials for Hul'q'umi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership, Halalt Logging Contracting LP, and 1241478 BC LTD. Funds held in trust of $1,669,558 from Ministry of Indigenous Relations and Reconciliation recorded as both asset and deferred revenue. Financial statements signed September 01, 2021 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Consolidation includes Halalt First Nation Government Administration, Halalt First Nation Trusts Fund, and CMHC Housing Program.
